help.huggingface.enabled: Enables the platform integration. It is disabled by default.
help.huggingface.token: Stored only in the Vault. Public Hub reads can work without a token; private content, writes, and Jobs require one.
help.huggingface.max_download_mb: Hard limit for files downloaded into the AuraGo workspace.
help.huggingface.max_dataset_rows: Hard limit for rows returned by Dataset Viewer operations.
help.huggingface.job_default_timeout: Timeout used when a Job does not specify one.
help.huggingface.job_max_runtime: Upper bound for every AuraGo-started Job.
help.huggingface.request_timeout: Maximum time AuraGo waits for an API request.
help.huggingface.max_result_bytes: Maximum response size accepted from Hugging Face APIs.
help.huggingface.read_only: Blocks writes and Jobs, even if their individual toggles are enabled.
help.huggingface.allow_writes: Allows repository creation, uploads, and discussions after allowlists are checked.
help.huggingface.allow_jobs: Allows paid or compute-backed Hugging Face Jobs after hardware and timeout checks.
help.huggingface.allowed_namespaces: Comma-separated namespace allowlist. Empty means no namespace restriction.
help.huggingface.allowed_repos: Comma-separated repository allowlist for remote mutations.
help.huggingface.allowed_hardware: Comma-separated hardware tiers permitted for Jobs. CPU basic is the safe default.
help.huggingface.hub_base_url: Hugging Face Hub API base URL.
help.huggingface.jobs_base_url: Hugging Face Jobs API base URL.
help.huggingface.router_base_url: OpenAI-compatible Hugging Face router URL for the provider catalog.
